items.title: DMK’s Periyakaruppan moves Madras HC to prevent TVK MLA from participating in vote of confidence
items.summary: The Minister lost by just one vote to TVK’s Seenivasa Sethupathy; Justices L. Victoria Gowri and N. Senthilkumar to hold a special sitting on May 10 to hear the case

items.title: Person killed after being hit by plane on runway at Denver airport
items.summary: The unidentified individual had jumped a perimeter fence two minutes before being struck by the airliner.
